title: Cheaper Beetroots Soup
body:
Have you ever wanted to eat beetroot soup?

Well fear no more good sir now with
Cheaper Beetroots Soup
You can!
Its much easier to sustain your self from it.
All you need is 3 peaces of beetroots, a bowl and you are good my friend.
You can even do it on the go!


### Now with Farmers Delight support!


[![Kinetic Partner Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a434cb888cd675034184ac4173bb6e379e5f3a.png) Click on the banner or here to support me and my projects! :)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=853)
